title: Video by jamesbrennanofficial
description:
Spider Partner Race! 🕷️😂

Players pair up in a low “spider” position and race each other while staying linked and controlled it looks hilarious, but it’s a serious little mover of a game 💨

📌 What it trains:
✅ Core strength and full-body tension
✅ Coordination and balance
✅ Upper-body and shoulder strength
✅ Teamwork and loads of laughter

Perfect for warm-ups, kids’ sessions or just adding a bit of chaos and fun to training 👊

#FunConditioning
#KidsFitness
#CoreTraining
#MovementSkills
#TrainThroughPlay
